form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编码] orgId[业务组织] leadType[线索/商机类型] partnerId[客户] leadStatusId[线索状态] stageId[漏斗阶段] docStatus[单据状态] ==========>contact[联系方式]====== contactName[联系人姓名] contactPhone[联系电话] contactEmail[联系邮箱] companyName[公司名称] jobTitle[职位] department[部门] ==========>revenue[收入预测]====== expectedRevenue[预期收入] probability[成交概率] bestCaseAmount[乐观预期] worstCaseAmount[悲观预期] recurringRevenue[周期性收入] recurringPlan[周期性计划] expectedCloseDate[预期签单日] ==========^tracking[来源跟踪]========= sourceId[线索来源] campaignId[营销活动] utmMedium[UTM Medium] utmSource[UTM Source] ownerId[负责人] teamId[销售团队] territoryId[销售区域] lastContactDate[最后联系日期] nextActivityDate[下次活动日期] ==========^lostInfo[丢单信息]========= lostReasonId[丢单原因] lostReasonDesc[丢单描述] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= relatedBillType[转化结果单据类型] relatedBillCode[转化结果单据号] remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编码] orgId[业务组织] leadType[线索/商机类型] partnerId[客户] leadStatusId[线索状态] stageId[漏斗阶段] docStatus[单据状态] ==========>contact[联系方式]====== contactName[联系人姓名] contactPhone[联系电话] contactEmail[联系邮箱] companyName[公司名称] jobTitle[职位] department[部门] ==========>revenue[收入预测]====== expectedRevenue[预期收入] probability[成交概率] bestCaseAmount[乐观预期] worstCaseAmount[悲观预期] recurringRevenue[周期性收入] recurringPlan[周期性计划] expectedCloseDate[预期签单日] ==========^tracking[来源跟踪]========= sourceId[线索来源] campaignId[营销活动] utmMedium[UTM Medium] utmSource[UTM Source] ownerId[负责人] teamId[销售团队] territoryId[销售区域] lastContactDate[最后联系日期] nextActivityDate[下次活动日期] ==========^lostInfo[丢单信息]========= lostReasonId[丢单原因] lostReasonDesc[丢单描述] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[编码] leadStatusId[线索状态] stageId[漏斗阶段] ownerId[负责人] partnerId[客户]
